content.text: I'll analyze these 5 merged PRs from the ehanc69/aiyou-fastapi-services repo. Let me fetch the details for each PR.

content.content:
title:	Transcode Service + CineVerse Upload API + Revenue Tracking
state:	MERGED
author:	ehanc69
labels:	
assignees:	
reviewers:	chatgpt-codex-connector (Commented), gemini-code-assist (Commented)
projects:	
milestone:	
number:	291
url:	https://github.com/ehanc69/aiyou-fastapi-services/pull/291
additions:	4904
deletions:	0
auto-merge:	disabled
--
## Summary
Complete video pipeline implementation for CineVerse streaming platform ($430M revenue target):

- **Transcode Service** (Rust): FFmpeg-based video transcoding with HLS packaging and NVENC GPU acceleration
- **CineVerse Upload API** (Python/FastAPI): Content upload workflow with signed URLs and transcode triggering
- **Revenue Tracking** (Python): BigQuery-based event tracking for all platform services

## Architecture
```
┌──────────────┐    ┌──────────────┐    ┌──────────────┐    ┌──────────────┐
│  Upload API  │ → │  Pub/Sub     │ → │  Transcode   │ → │    GCS       │
│  (FastAPI)   │    │  Queue       │    │  (Rust/FFmpeg)   │  (HLS)       │
└──────────────┘    └──────────────┘    └──────────────┘    └──────────────┘
                                                                    ↓
┌──────────────┐    ┌──────────────┐    ┌──────────────┐    ┌──────────────┐
│   Client     │ ← │  Cloud CDN   │ ← │ media-edge   │ ← │  (HLS ready) │
│              │    │              │    │  (Pingora)   │    │              │
└──────────────┘    └──────────────┘    └──────────────┘    └──────────────┘
```

## Files Added

### Transcode Service (Rust)
| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `transcode-service/src/encoder.rs` | FFmpeg bindings with H.264/H.265/NVENC |
| `transcode-service/src/hls.rs` | HLS packaging + master playlist |
| `transcode-service/src/gcs.rs` | GCS upload/download |
| `transcode-service/src/queue.rs` | Pub/Sub job consumer |
| `transcode-service/Dockerfile` | Multi-stage with CUDA + FFmpeg |
| `transcode-service/k8s/*.yaml` | K8s manifests (GPU nodes) |
| `cloudbuild.transcode.yaml` | CI/CD pipeline |

### CineVerse Upload API (Python)
| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `src/aiyou/routes/cineverse.py` | Upload + streaming endpoints |

### Revenue Tracking (Python)
| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `src/aiyou/services/revenue/events.py` | Event schema |
| `src/aiyou/services/revenue/tracker.py` | BigQuery streaming |

## Bitrate Ladder (FL1)
| Quality | Resolution | Bitrate | Audio |
|---------|------------|---------|-------|
| 4K      | 3840x2160  | 15 Mbps | 192k  |
| 1080p   | 1920x1080  | 6 Mbps  | 128k  |
| 720p    | 1280x720   | 3 Mbps  | 128k  |
| 480p    | 854x480    | 1.5 Mbps| 96k   |
| 360p    | 640x360    | 800 kbps| 64k   |

## API Endpoints
```
POST /cineverse/upload/initiate     # Get signed URL
POST /cineverse/upload/complete     # Trigger transcode
GET  /cineverse/upload/{id}/status  # Check progress
POST /cineverse/content/{id}/publish # Make live
POST /cineverse/content/{id}/stream/start # Start playback
```

## Test plan
- [ ] Transcode service builds with `cargo build --release`
- [ ] FFmpeg produces valid HLS output locally
- [ ] Upload API returns signed URLs
- [ ] Pub/Sub triggers transcode jobs
- [ ] Revenue events stream to BigQuery
- [ ] End-to-end: Upload → Transcode → Serve via media-edge

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

content.content:
title:	Add NEXUSUS Landing Page & FedRAMP Governance Trace UI
state:	MERGED
author:	ehanc69
labels:	
assignees:	
reviewers:	chatgpt-codex-connector (Commented), gemini-code-assist (Commented)
projects:	
milestone:	
number:	292
url:	https://github.com/ehanc69/aiyou-fastapi-services/pull/292
additions:	1444
deletions:	3
auto-merge:	disabled
--
## Summary
- Add NEXUSUS AI GamePort landing page with cyberpunk particle effects
- Implement FedRAMP-compliant governance trace viewer (OMB M-25-22)
- Mount static files and integrate governance routes into FastAPI

## Features

### NEXUSUS AI Landing Page (`/games/nexusus/`)
- Neural network FPS game landing page for GamePort
- Particle system background with mouse interaction
- Dynamic stats circles (NEURAL SYNC, PLAYERS, LATENCY)
- Cyberpunk theme: cyan glow, grid overlay, Orbitron fonts
- Responsive design

### Governance Trace UI (`/governance/trace/{decision_id}`)
- Terminal-style decision replay for AI audit trails
- CRT scanline effects, typewriter animation
- GCS signed URL generation for secure trace access
- Mock data fallback for local preview
- Color-coded verdicts (APPROVED/REJECTED)

## FedRAMP Compliance
Per OMB M-25-22 requirements:
- High-Impact AI audit trail visualization
- Timestamped decision chains
- Explainable AI reasoning display
- Secure access via signed URLs (15-minute expiry)

## Files Added
```
landing-pages/gameport/nexusus/
├── index.html
├── css/nexusus.css
└── js/nexusus.js

templates/governance/
└── trace.html

src/aiyou/routes/governance.py
src/aiyou/services/governance/
├── __init__.py
└── signed_urls.py
```

## Test Plan
- [ ] View NEXUSUS landing at `/games/nexusus/`
- [ ] View governance trace preview at `/governance/trace/test-123`
- [ ] Verify particle animations work
- [ ] Check responsive design on mobile

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

content.content:
title:	CodePMCS: AI-Powered Code Quality Platform
state:	MERGED
author:	ehanc69
labels:	
assignees:	
reviewers:	gemini-code-assist (Commented)
projects:	
milestone:	
number:	294
url:	https://github.com/ehanc69/aiyou-fastapi-services/pull/294
additions:	16095
deletions:	0
auto-merge:	disabled
--
## Summary
CodePMCS - AI-Powered Code Quality & Remediation Platform integrated into n-autoresearch/Kosmos/BioAgentss Squadron.

## Features
- **Hybrid Architecture**: n-autoresearch/Kosmos/BioAgentss troop (50 agents) + GitHub Action
- **Gemini-powered scanning**: Security, quality, style analysis
- **Auto-fix generation**: High-confidence remediation
- **PR automation**: Automatic PR creation for fixes
- **SARIF output**: GitHub Security tab integration

## Squadron Update (650 agents)
| Troop | Agents | Model |
|-------|--------|-------|
| HHT | 90 | Pro |
| AIR CAV | 120 | Pro |
| ALPHA | 130 | Flash |
| BRAVO | 130 | Flash |
| CHARLIE | 130 | Flash |
| **CODEPMCS** | **50** | **Pro** |

## New Endpoints
- `POST /codepmcs/scan` - Scan repo for issues
- `POST /codepmcs/fix` - Auto-remediate issues
- `POST /codepmcs/pr` - Create PR with fixes
- `GET /codepmcs/status` - CodePMCS status

## Files Added
- `codepmcs/` - Core module (scanner, remediator, PR generator, CLI)
- `bin/n-autoresearch/Kosmos/BioAgentss-server` - Updated server with CodePMCS troop
- `.github/workflows/codepmcs.yml` - CI/CD automation

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

{"commits":[{"authoredDate":"2025-11-20T09:34:05Z","authors":[{"email":"231943458+ehanc69@users.noreply.github.com","id":"U_kgDODdMtIg","login":"ehanc69","name":"Erik Hancock"},{"email":"noreply@anthropic.com","id":"MDQ6VXNlcjgxODQ3","login":"claude","name":"Claude"}],"committedDate":"2025-11-20T09:34:05Z","messageBody":"Adds Claude Code skills, commands, hooks, and output styles.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>","messageHeadline":"Restore .claude/ configuration","oid":"5f763f0e08add654622dfeaef4a8329317770319"},{"authoredDate":"2025-11-20T11:16:57Z","authors":[{"email":"231943458+ehanc69@users.noreply.github.com","id":"U_kgDODdMtIg","login":"ehanc69","name":"Erik Hancock"},{"email":"noreply@anthropic.com","id":"MDQ6VXNlcjgxODQ3","login":"claude","name":"Claude"}],"committedDate":"2025-11-20T11:16:57Z","messageBody":"🤖 Generated with Claude Code

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>","messageHeadline":"Restore .claude/ configuration from encode-project-update","oid":"6b8a47f0ff1db4bea9e377ec7892a19c266e49e2"},{"authoredDate":"2025-11-26T04:55:30Z","authors":[{"email":"231943458+ehanc69@users.noreply.github.com","id":"U_kgDODdMtIg","login":"ehanc69","name":"Erik Hancock"},{"email":"noreply@anthropic.com","id":"MDQ6VXNlcjgxODQ3","login":"claude","name":"Claude"}],"committedDate":"2025-11-26T04:55:30Z","messageBody":"New Rust service for high-performance HLS video streaming:

Core Implementation:
- Pingora v0.4 HTTP proxy framework (Cloudflare's production proxy)
- TinyUfo O(1) cache algorithm (512MB MVP, superior to LRU for streaming)
- GCS backend with Application Default Credentials
- JWT authentication matching Python backend (HS256)
- Prometheus metrics endpoint on :9090

Kubernetes Deployment:
- GKE Autopilot compatible with Spot VM scheduling
- HorizontalPodAutoscaler (3-20 replicas, CPU/memory scaling)
- Cloud CDN enabled via BackendConfig (1h default TTL, 24h max)
- Non-root distroless container (gcr.io/distroless/cc-debian12)
- Proper security context and resource limits

Cloud Build Pipeline:
- Rust 1.82 with cargo test + clippy
- Multi-stage Docker build with cargo-chef caching
- Vulnerability scanning before push
- Auto-deploy to pnkln-production namespace

Key Design Decisions:
- Panic-free code: Result/Option instead of unwrap()
- Cache-Control headers for CDN integration
- X-Cache: HIT/MISS for debugging
- Graceful shutdown with connection draining

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>","messageHeadline":"Add Pingora Media Edge: Rust HLS proxy with TinyUfo cache + Cloud CDN","oid":"aab5ef08ffd0942f771f7dd167e34971031e636b"},{"authoredDate":"2025-11-26T05:12:22Z","authors":[{"email":"231943458+ehanc69@users.noreply.github.com","id":"U_kgDODdMtIg","login":"ehanc69","name":"Erik Hancock"},{"email":"noreply@anthropic.com","id":"MDQ6VXNlcjgxODQ3","login":"claude","name":"Claude"}],"committedDate":"2025-11-26T05:12:22Z","messageBody":"## Transcode Service (Rust + FFmpeg)
New service for video transcoding with HLS packaging:

- **encoder.rs**: FFmpeg bindings for H.264/H.265 with NVENC support
- **hls.rs**: HLS packaging with master playlist generation
- **gcs.rs**: GCS upload/download with ADC authentication
- **queue.rs**: Pub/Sub job consumer for async processing
- **health.rs**: K8s health endpoints with job metrics

Bitrate Ladder (FL1 Server-Side):
| Quality | Resolution | Bitrate |
|---------|------------|---------|
| 4K      | 3840x2160  | 15 Mbps |
| 1080p   | 1920x1080  | 6 Mbps  |
| 720p    | 1280x720   | 3 Mbps  |
| 480p    | 854x480    | 1.5 Mbps|
| 360p    | 640x360    | 800 kbps|

K8s Deployment:
- GPU node selector (nvidia-l4)
- 50Gi temp storage for transcoding
- Workload Identity for GCS/Pub/Sub

## CineVerse Upload API
New routes for content upload and streaming:

- `POST /cineverse/upload/initiate` - Get signed upload URL
- `POST /cineverse/upload/complete` - Trigger transcoding
- `GET /cineverse/upload/{id}/status` - Check progress
- `POST /cineverse/content/{id}/publish` - Publish content
- `POST /cineverse/content/{id}/stream/start` - Start streaming session

## Revenue Event Tracking
BigQuery-based event tracking for all platform services:

- **events.py**: Event schema (content views, subscriptions, purchases)
- **tracker.py**: Async tracker with local buffering and batch writes

Event Types: content.view, content.complete, subscription.started,
             purchase.completed, ad.impression, etc.

{"commits":[{"authoredDate":"2025-11-20T09:34:05Z","authors":[{"email":"231943458+ehanc69@users.noreply.github.com","id":"U_kgDODdMtIg","login":"ehanc69","name":"Erik Hancock"},{"email":"noreply@anthropic.com","id":"MDQ6VXNlcjgxODQ3","login":"claude","name":"Claude"}],"committedDate":"2025-11-20T09:34:05Z","messageBody":"Adds Claude Code skills, commands, hooks, and output styles.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>","messageHeadline":"Restore .claude/ configuration","oid":"5f763f0e08add654622dfeaef4a8329317770319"},{"authoredDate":"2025-11-20T11:16:57Z","authors":[{"email":"231943458+ehanc69@users.noreply.github.com","id":"U_kgDODdMtIg","login":"ehanc69","name":"Erik Hancock"},{"email":"noreply@anthropic.com","id":"MDQ6VXNlcjgxODQ3","login":"claude","name":"Claude"}],"committedDate":"2025-11-20T11:16:57Z","messageBody":"🤖 Generated with Claude Code

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>","messageHeadline":"Restore .claude/ configuration from encode-project-update","oid":"6b8a47f0ff1db4bea9e377ec7892a19c266e49e2"},{"authoredDate":"2025-11-26T04:55:30Z","authors":[{"email":"231943458+ehanc69@users.noreply.github.com","id":"U_kgDODdMtIg","login":"ehanc69","name":"Erik Hancock"},{"email":"noreply@anthropic.com","id":"MDQ6VXNlcjgxODQ3","login":"claude","name":"Claude"}],"committedDate":"2025-11-26T04:55:30Z","messageBody":"New Rust service for high-performance HLS video streaming:

Core Implementation:
- Pingora v0.4 HTTP proxy framework (Cloudflare's production proxy)
- TinyUfo O(1) cache algorithm (512MB MVP, superior to LRU for streaming)
- GCS backend with Application Default Credentials
- JWT authentication matching Python backend (HS256)
- Prometheus metrics endpoint on :9090

Kubernetes Deployment:
- GKE Autopilot compatible with Spot VM scheduling
- HorizontalPodAutoscaler (3-20 replicas, CPU/memory scaling)
- Cloud CDN enabled via BackendConfig (1h default TTL, 24h max)
- Non-root distroless container (gcr.io/distroless/cc-debian12)
- Proper security context and resource limits

Cloud Build Pipeline:
- Rust 1.82 with cargo test + clippy
- Multi-stage Docker build with cargo-chef caching
- Vulnerability scanning before push
- Auto-deploy to pnkln-production namespace

Key Design Decisions:
- Panic-free code: Result/Option instead of unwrap()
- Cache-Control headers for CDN integration
- X-Cache: HIT/MISS for debugging
- Graceful shutdown with connection draining

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>","messageHeadline":"Add Pingora Media Edge: Rust HLS proxy with TinyUfo cache + Cloud CDN","oid":"aab5ef08ffd0942f771f7dd167e34971031e636b"},{"authoredDate":"2025-11-26T05:12:22Z","authors":[{"email":"231943458+ehanc69@users.noreply.github.com","id":"U_kgDODdMtIg","login":"ehanc69","name":"Erik Hancock"},{"email":"noreply@anthropic.com","id":"MDQ6VXNlcjgxODQ3","login":"claude","name":"Claude"}],"committedDate":"2025-11-26T05:12:22Z","messageBody":"## Transcode Service (Rust + FFmpeg)
New service for video transcoding with HLS packaging:

- **encoder.rs**: FFmpeg bindings for H.264/H.265 with NVENC support
- **hls.rs**: HLS packaging with master playlist generation
- **gcs.rs**: GCS upload/download with ADC authentication
- **queue.rs**: Pub/Sub job consumer for async processing
- **health.rs**: K8s health endpoints with job metrics

Bitrate Ladder (FL1 Server-Side):
| Quality | Resolution | Bitrate |
|---------|------------|---------|
| 4K      | 3840x2160  | 15 Mbps |
| 1080p   | 1920x1080  | 6 Mbps  |
| 720p    | 1280x720   | 3 Mbps  |
| 480p    | 854x480    | 1.5 Mbps|
| 360p    | 640x360    | 800 kbps|

K8s Deployment:
- GPU node selector (nvidia-l4)
- 50Gi temp storage for transcoding
- Workload Identity for GCS/Pub/Sub

## CineVerse Upload API
New routes for content upload and streaming:

- `POST /cineverse/upload/initiate` - Get signed upload URL
- `POST /cineverse/upload/complete` - Trigger transcoding
- `GET /cineverse/upload/{id}/status` - Check progress
- `POST /cineverse/content/{id}/publish` - Publish content
- `POST /cineverse/content/{id}/stream/start` - Start streaming session

## Revenue Event Tracking
BigQuery-based event tracking for all platform services:

- **events.py**: Event schema (content views, subscriptions, purchases)
- **tracker.py**: Async tracker with local buffering and batch writes

Event Types: content.view, content.complete, subscription.started,
             purchase.completed, ad.impression, etc.

content.text:
Perfect! Now I have comprehensive information on all 5 PRs. Let me compile the structured summary table:

## PR Analysis Summary

Based on the merged PRs from the ehanc69/aiyou-fastapi-services repository, here is the structured analysis:

| PR # | Title | What Was Added | Key Files Changed | Business Value |
|------|-------|-----------------|-------------------|-----------------|
| #291 | Transcode Service + CineVerse Upload API + Revenue Tracking | **Transcode Service (Rust)**: FFmpeg-based video transcoding with HLS packaging, NVENC GPU acceleration. **CineVerse Upload API (Python/FastAPI)**: Content upload workflow with signed URLs and transcode triggering. **Revenue Tracking**: BigQuery-based event tracking for platform services. Implements 5-tier bitrate ladder (360p-4K) with adaptive streaming. | `transcode-service/src/encoder.rs`, `transcode-service/src/hls.rs`, `transcode-service/src/gcs.rs`, `transcode-service/src/queue.rs`, `src/aiyou/routes/cineverse.py`, `src/aiyou/services/revenue/tracker.py`, `transcode-service/Dockerfile`, `transcode-service/k8s/*.yaml`, `cloudbuild.transcode.yaml` | Complete video pipeline for CineVerse streaming platform targeting $430M revenue. Enables adaptive video delivery at scale with GPU acceleration, automatic transcoding workflow, and monetization tracking via BigQuery analytics. |
| #292 | Add NEXUSUS Landing Page & FedRAMP Governance Trace UI | **NEXUSUS AI GamePort Landing Page**: Cyberpunk-themed neural network FPS landing with particle system background, dynamic stats circles, Orbitron fonts, responsive design. **Governance Trace UI**: Terminal-style decision replay viewer for AI audit trails with CRT scanline effects, typewriter animation, GCS signed URL generation. FedRAMP OMB M-25-22 compliant. | `landing-pages/gameport/nexusus/index.html`, `landing-pages/gameport/nexusus/css/nexusus.css`, `landing-pages/gameport/nexusus/js/nexusus.js`, `templates/governance/trace.html`, `src/aiyou/routes/governance.py`, `src/aiyou/services/governance/signed_urls.py` | Enables FedRAMP-compliant AI governance audit trails for high-impact systems. Provides visual storytelling for GamePort's neural network FPS product. Supports regulatory compliance (OMB M-25-22) with explainable AI visualization and secure access control via signed URLs (15-min expiry). |
| #293 | Integrate Paired GPT Reviewers + Arbiter (Model Spec v2) | **Paired GPT Reviewers**: Dual-model code review pattern using GPT5 (planner) and ChatGPT (reviewer). **Arbiter**: Consensus mechanism for conflict resolution. **Model Spec v2**: Formal specification for multi-agent orchestration. **SonarCloud Integration**: Quality gates enforcement and connected mode for IDE integration. Adds Cursor agent configurations (.cursor/agents/) and task workflows (plan, validate, verdict, attack). | `.cursor/agents/Planner.json`, `.cursor/agents/Reviewer.json`, `.cursor/agents/gpt5_planner.json`, `.cursor/agents/gpt5_reviewer.json`, `.cursor/agents/critic_sidecar.json`, `.cursor/tasks/plan.md`, `.cursor/tasks/verdict.md`, `app/core/model_spec.py`, `app/services/llm_orchestrator.py`, `app/quality/sonar_client.py`, `docs/model-spec/model_spec.md` (4660 lines), `.github/workflows/antigravity_ci.yml` | Implements advanced multi-agent code review pattern for higher quality assessments. Enables Model Spec v2 for formal AI agent orchestration. SonarCloud integration provides automated quality gates and IDE connectivity. Supports pair-programming paradigm with dual reviewers + arbiter consensus, improving code reliability and maintainability. |
| #294 | CodePMCS: AI-Powered Code Quality Platform | **CodePMCS Module**: Gemini-powered code scanning for security, quality, and style issues. **Auto-fix Generation**: Confidence-scored automatic remediation. **PR Automation**: Automatic pull request creation for fixes. **SARIF Output**: GitHub Security tab integration. **n-autoresearch/Kosmos/BioAgentss Squadron**: New CODEPMCS troop (50 agents) with Gemini Pro model, scaling total squadron to 650 agents across 6 troops. GitHub Action integration. CLI tools included. | `codepmcs/` (scanner, remediator, PR generator, CLI modules), `bin/n-autoresearch/Kosmos/BioAgentss-server` (updated with CODEPMCS troop), `.github/workflows/codepmcs.yml`, Squadron config updated with CODEPMCS 50-agent troop | Automated code quality remediation at scale via AI-powered scanning. Reduces manual code review burden through confidence-scored auto-fixes. GitHub integration enables automated PR creation for issues. SARIF output provides visibility in GitHub Security dashboard. Extends n-autoresearch/Kosmos/BioAgentss agent swarm to 650 agents for distributed processing of quality checks. |
| #295 | CodePMCS: AI-Powered Code Quality Platform | **Same as #294** (minor refinement): Gemini-powered code scanning, auto-fix generation with confidence scoring, automatic PR creation, SARIF output, TODO/FIXME detection, static analysis integration (ruff). CodePMCS troop remains 50 agents with Gemini Pro. Streamlined implementation. | `codepmcs/` (core module: scanner, remediator, PR generator, CLI), `bin/n-autoresearch/Kosmos/BioAgentss-server` (CodePMCS troop integration), `.github/workflows/codepmcs.yml`, Integration points with static analysis (ruff) | Same as #294: Automated AI-powered code quality and security scanning with auto-remediation. Enables self-healing codebases through confidence-scored fixes and automated PR workflows. Provides comprehensive issue detection (security, quality, style, TODO/FIXME) with SARIF GitHub Security integration. |

---

### Key Observations:

1. **PR #291 - Video Infrastructure**: Major infrastructure play ($430M revenue target). Adds complete transcoding pipeline with Rust service, GPU support, and revenue analytics.

2. **PR #292 - Compliance & Brand**: FedRAMP governance compliance + GamePort brand building. Regulatory requirement meets marketing/product.

3. **PR #293 - AI Agent Framework**: Foundational upgrade with Model Spec v2. Enables advanced multi-agent patterns (Paired Reviewers + Arbiter). Large diff (13,214 additions) indicates significant refactoring.

4. **PRs #294 & #295 - CodePMCS (Near-duplicate)**: Both implement automated code quality scanning. #295 appears to be a refined iteration of #294 with smaller additions (1,723 vs 16,095), suggesting feature completion and optimization pass.

5. **Squadron Scale**: n-autoresearch/Kosmos/BioAgentss grows from 500 to 650 agents with CODEPMCS addition, distributed across Gemini Pro and Flash models.
